code_files.content: new runtime assembly for the simulation core
serializable WorldState, RegionState, and KeyValueEntry runtime models
custom deterministic PRNG with snapshot support
tick settings, context, tick result, and run result types
deterministic subsystem interface for engine orchestration
single-tick and multi-tick engine execution with cloned state, fixed timestep, RNG, and logging
structured per-tick transition records and in-memory logger
JsonUtility load/save, clone, normalization, and validation-oriented result reporting
editor-side batch runner used to execute EditMode tests and capture machine-readable results
updated to reference the new WhatIfSimulator.Core assembly
project structure section updated to use canonical nested Unity paths
payload-count helper made robust for JsonUtility materialization behavior

test_files.content: RNG determinism, divergence, snapshot, and normalized-range coverage
canonical world-state load, round-trip, and invalid-input coverage
tick advancement, transition logging, reproducibility, negative-control seed divergence, and invalid-setting coverage

notes: The full Unity EditMode suite passed through the custom batch runner.
Coverage percentages were not produced because the local Unity test tooling available here did not emit a coverage report.
The red phase was not cleanly preserved as a standalone executable checkpoint because Unity batch execution needed a custom runner during implementation.
